name: forge
description: Turn a finished napkin spec into an opinionated build blueprint and hand off to the build loop. Reads the spec/ workspace, verifies the latest best-practice stack (Bun + Turborepo + TypeScript, Drizzle with a PGlite⇄Postgres-16 env switch, shared Zod contracts, a single use-case layer behind Hono API + MCP, Better Auth multi-tenancy/RBAC, Vercel AI SDK 5 with LLM fixtures, latest React + Tailwind/shadcn driven by impeccable, one mock⇄real ports abstraction, Pulumi/Cloud Run), writes spec/architecture.md (stack, monorepo layout, a data-first build sequence with backend-complete + landing-page-first + stop-to-validate checkpoints, and a continuous spec-drift protocol), then hands off to superpowers:writing-plans → subagent-driven-development. Blueprint + handoff only — it never runs scaffolding commands.
